title: agropyron × duvalii
intro: Agropyron × duvalii, also known as intermediate wheatgrass, is a perennial grass that is a hybrid of Agropyron intermedium and Elymus caninus. It has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of antioxidants, saponins, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of intermediate wheatgrass include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. It can be used in herbal preparations such as tea, juice, and powder, often consumed fresh or frozen, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
